name: obslab
description: Microservices chaos engineering laboratory with REST workflow simulation

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @obslab/shared build && pnpm --filter @obslab/db prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @obslab/db build && pnpm --filter @obslab/orchestrator build && pnpm --filter @obslab/worker build && pnpm --filter @obslab/web build
scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @obslab/shared build && pnpm --filter @obslab/db prisma:generate && concurrently -n orch,alpha,beta,gamma,web -c blue,green,yellow,magenta,cyan "pnpm --filter @obslab/orchestrator dev" "pnpm --filter @obslab/worker dev:alpha" "pnpm --filter @obslab/worker dev:beta" "pnpm --filter @obslab/worker dev:gamma" "pnpm --filter @obslab/web dev"
